2026-04-10T00:36:30.2532621Z You are in 'detached HEAD' state. You can look around, make experimental
2026-04-10T00:36:30.2533498Z changes and commit them, and you can discard any commits you make in this
2026-04-10T00:36:30.2534559Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.
2026-04-10T00:36:30.2535043Z 
2026-04-10T00:36:30.2535376Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-04-10T00:36:30.2536177Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-10T00:36:30.2536612Z 
2026-04-10T00:36:30.2536807Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-10T00:36:30.2537109Z 
2026-04-10T00:36:30.2537283Z Or undo this operation with:
2026-04-10T00:36:30.2537573Z 
2026-04-10T00:36:30.2537726Z   git switch -
2026-04-10T00:36:30.2537932Z
